mapper.insert: INSERT INTO boards (name, code, description, sort_order, status, post_count, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{code}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{postCount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, code, description, sort_order, status, post_count, created_at, updated_at FROM boards WHERE code = #{code} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, name, code, description, sort_order, status, post_count, created_at, updated_at FROM boards
(name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, name, code, description, sort_order, status, post_count, created_at, updated_at FROM boards WHERE status = 'enabled' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
